projects.name: AI Schedule Generator
projects.description: A Flutter mobile application that leverages AI to generate personalized schedules based on natural language input. Includes local persistent storage and fluid animations.

projects.name: Film / LK21 Vibe
projects.description: A web application that aggregates and displays movie information, inspired by popular movie streaming platforms. Features a slick, dark-themed UI.

projects.name: Klinik Gigi Sehat
projects.description: A professional landing page and service portal for a dental clinic. Highlights services, booking processes, and clinic information with a clean, trustworthy design.

projects.name: Message for Developer
projects.description: An interactive web platform enabling direct, anonymous, or public messaging targeted at developers. Includes real-time submission components.

projects.name: Reading List App
projects.description: A practical application for tracking books, reading progress, and personal reviews. Designed with a clean three-column layout for an optimal reading experience.

projects.name: Moodvibes
projects.description: An aesthetic platform matching user moods with specific visual vibes, audio, or content. Focuses heavily on micro-animations and seamless UI transitions.

projects.name: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: A unique, X (Twitter)-inspired personal portfolio website built natively with modern web standards, highlighting skills, projects, and experiences dynamically.

projects.name: QR Scan & Generate
projects.description: A versatile tool capable of generating customized QR codes from text/URLs and scanning existing ones via device camera integrations.
